title: SLA Breach Alert
message: Service level agreement for API Gateway has been breached. Response time exceeded 2000ms threshold for the last 15 minutes.

title: Security Vulnerability Detected
message: A critical CVE-2026-1337 vulnerability has been detected in the authentication service. Immediate patching is required.

title: Cost Spike Detected
message: Cloud spend has increased by 34% in the last 24 hours compared to the 7-day average. Current projected monthly cost: $48,200.

title: Anomaly in API Latency
message: Unusual latency pattern detected on the /api/v2/reports endpoint. P99 latency is 3.2x above baseline over the last 30 minutes.

title: Backup Job Delayed
message: Scheduled nightly backup for production database has been delayed by 2 hours. Backup window may overlap with morning peak traffic.

title: Change CHG-2026-042 Approved
message: Change request CHG-2026-042 for the load balancer configuration update has been approved by the Change Advisory Board. Scheduled for 2026-03-11 02:00 UTC.

title: Backup Complete
message: Full backup of the analytics data warehouse completed successfully. 2.4 TB archived to cold storage. Retention: 90 days.

title: New AI Insight Available
message: The AI engine has identified a new optimization opportunity: consolidating 3 underutilized compute clusters could reduce infrastructure costs by ~12%.

title: SSL Certificate Renewed
message: SSL certificate for transparency-portal.alliswell.com has been automatically renewed. New expiry: 2027-03-10.

title: Dashboard Layout Saved
message: Your custom dashboard layout has been saved successfully and will be restored on your next login.

title: Export Complete
message: Your requested PDF export of the Q1 2026 Executive Summary report is ready. The file will be available for download for 48 hours.

title: @gaurav mentioned you in a comment
message: @gaurav: "@you — can you review the updated SLA thresholds in the Operations widget? I've adjusted the P99 targets based on last quarter's data."
